Building Your Dream

Founded in 1995, Blue River Construction is a family-owned business dedicated to making your dream home a reality. Whether you're building from the ground-up or planning a remodel, we're here to help.

Our Story

Decades of Exceptional Craftsmanship

25 Years of Experience in Custom Homes and Remodels. Jeff Wartena founded Blue River Construction out of a desire to make every home the very best it can be — personal attention with quality craftsmanship on every project.

Licensed General Contractor
Master Carpenter & Tile Layer
Parade of Homes Experience
Family-Owned Since 1995
Meet Jeff
What We Do

Built For Every Stage
Of Your Home

From foundations to finish work, Blue River handles residential projects of every scale across Utah County and beyond.

New Construction

Custom homes built from the ground up. From starter homes to Parade of Homes showcases.

Learn More →
Remodels

Whole-home makeovers, additions, bathrooms, decks, and everything in between.

Learn More →
Finish Carpentry

Mantels, banisters, trim, and detail work crafted like fine furniture.

Learn More →
Kitchens

From open-concept conversions to professional catering kitchens.

Custom Work

One-of-a-kind builds and specialty projects tailored exactly to your vision.
